ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Brand of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, convertible) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., gas, diesel) */,
  "drive_wheels" TEXT /* Drive wheels configuration (e.g., rwd, fwd) */,
  "engine_location" TEXT /* Location of the engine (e.g., front, rear) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., dohc, ohc) */,
  "engine_size" INTEGER /* Size of the engine in cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "normalized_losses" INTEGER /* Normalized losses for the vehicle model */,
  "symboling" INTEGER /* Symboling value for the vehicle model */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the vehicle in inches */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., SE, LE, SEL) */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color options */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Exterior color options */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Average mileage of the model */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the model */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle in inventory */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the vehicle is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., new, used, sold) */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was received in inventory */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was sold */,
  "sold_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the specific vehicle */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Exterior color of the specific vehicle */,
  "previous_owners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Summary of the service history */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "is_certified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is certified pre-owned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation coordinates (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "commission" INTEGER /* Commission earned by the salesperson */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, financing) */,
  "financing_terms" TEXT /* Financing terms if applicable */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "trade_in_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trade-in vehicle, if any */,
  "trade_in_vin" TEXT /* VIN of the trade-in vehicle, if any */,
  "is_test_drive" INTEGER /* Indicates if a test drive was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral (e.g., friend, online, walk-in) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership status (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the salesperson */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the salesperson (e.g., sales, manager) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the salesperson */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the salesperson was hired */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the salesperson */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made */,
  "total_commissions" INTEGER /* Total commissions earned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the salesperson is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service performed */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the service */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  "mileage_at_service" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of service */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the service */,
  "is_warranty_claim" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service was a warranty claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the technician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the technician (e.g., engine, brakes) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the technician was hired */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  "total_services_performed" INTEGER /* Total number of services performed */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the technician */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the technician is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_type" TEXT /* Type of inquiry (e.g., sales, service, parts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inquiry */,
  "handled_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who handled the inquiry */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was resolved */,
  "inquiry_source" TEXT /* Source of the inquiry (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating of the customer after resolution */,
  "is_escalated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inquiry was escalated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_handled_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., sales, service, management) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the staff member */,
  "total_sales_assisted" INTEGER /* Total number of sales assisted */,
  "total_services_handled" INTEGER /* Total number of services handled */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who earned the commission */,
  "commission_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the commission earned */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the commission was earned */,
  "commission_type" TEXT /* Type of commission (e.g., flat rate, percentage) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the commission has been paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the commission was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_commissions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_commissions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)
